# CWE-820: Missing Synchronization (pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-820-vulnerable.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"encoding/json"
	"net/http"
)

var visitCounts = map[string]int{}

// Vulnerable: shared map is updated from concurrent handlers without locking.
// Concurrent HTTP handlers may corrupt map state or lose counter updates.
func TrackVisit(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	key := r.RemoteAddr
	if key == "" {
		key = "unknown"
	}
	visitCounts[key] = visitCounts[key] + 1
	w.Header().Set("Content-Type", "application/json")
	_ = json.NewEncoder(w).Encode(map[string]int{"visits": visitCounts[key]})
}
